name: WLF_LI_ELEARNINGS_F
description: This table is used to store elearning items information.

columns.Name: ELEARNING_ID
columns.Comments: System generated unique identifier

columns.Name: EFFECTIVE_START_DATE
columns.Comments: Date Effective Entity: indicates the date at the beginning of the date range within which the row is effective.

columns.Name: EFFECTIVE_END_DATE
columns.Comments: Date Effective Entity: indicates the date at the end of the date range within which the row is effective.

columns.Name: ELEARNING_TYPE
columns.Comments: This column is used to represents different elearning item types

columns.Name: ELEARNING_CATEGORY
columns.Comments: Column used to differentiate elearning types denormalized from learning_item_category

columns.Name: LEARNING_ITEM_ID
columns.Comments: This column behaves as foriegn key and  refers to parent table column

columns.Name: SOURCE_TYPE
columns.Comments: This column populates source_type of elearning for category

columns.Name: CREATED_BY_ID
columns.Comments: Indicates the person identifier who created the object.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: ENTERPRISE_ID
columns.Comments: Identifier of Enterprise, used for multi-tenancy partitioning. Foreign key to HR_ORGANIZATION_UNITS.

columns.Name: RELATED_CONTENT_ID
columns.Comments: This is column holds value of content LEARNING_ITEM_ID from WLF_LEARNING_ITEMS_F table of ORA_CONTENT_ROOT learning item type related to ELearning

columns.Name: CONTENT_DELETE_REASON_CODE
columns.Comments: Reason code for content deletion

columns.Name: CONTENT_DELETE_DATE
columns.Comments: Content Delete Date

columns.Name: CAPACITY_ENABLED
columns.Comments: Property to represent if capacity is enabled

columns.Name: CAPACITY_MINIMUM
columns.Comments: Minimum capacity setting

columns.Name: CAPACITY_MAXIMUM
columns.Comments: Maximum capacity setting

columns.Name: WAITLIST_ENABLED
columns.Comments: Property to represent if waitlist is enabled

columns.Name: WAITLIST_MAXIMUM_ENABLED
columns.Comments: Property to represent if waitlist maximum capacity is enabled

columns.Name: WAITLIST_MAXIMUM
columns.Comments: Maximum waitlist setting

columns.Name: WAITLIST_RULE
columns.Comments: Waitlisting rule on who can add learners to waitlist

columns.Name: TRAINING_SUPPLIER_ID
columns.Comments: Training supplier id

columns.Name: PARENT_LEARNING_ITEM_ID
columns.Comments: Indicates the Parent (Ex : Course) Learning Item Id to which Event is associated with.

columns.Name: CLOSED_DATE
columns.Comments: Learning Item closed date

columns.Name: CLOSED_ACTIVITY_STATUS
columns.Comments: Operation for closed event

columns.Name: CLOSED_REASON_CODE
columns.Comments: Reason code for closed event
